DROP ROLE user123 WITH ADMIN grantor_admin;
DROP ROLE existing_role_2 WITH ADMIN grantor_user;
DROP ROLE role_name_in_subquery WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.roles) > 0;
DROP ROLE (SELECT role_name FROM sys.roles WHERE role_name LIKE 'test%') WITH ADMIN grantor_user;
DROP ROLE (SELECT role_name FROM (SELECT role_name FROM sys.roles) AS temp_roles) WITH ADMIN grantor_setter;
